metadata.description: A comprehensive framework designed to improve the reliability, simplicity, and efficiency of AI coding agents (Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT). Inspired by Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM pitfalls, these guidelines force AI models to prioritize caution, communication, and verifiable outcomes.

plugins.name: ai-skills
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines for surgical, simple, and goal-driven development: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution, and more.
